best_by_cache_reduction.read: The cache model preserves query-major traversal and avoids dense active_group initialization. cache_reduction_x must be high enough to justify a HIP implementation, and cache_rows_over_full_rows_x shows how much reduction it leaves on the floor versus perfect full-tile segmentation.

read: If small cache_slots rows reach useful reduction while staying far below dense active-group table size, implement a sparse hash/cache HIP diagnostic. If only 512-1024 slots work, the cache is just the rejected dense table in disguise.
